toAnalyze.subject: Sale from Mexico and doubt
toAnalyze.body: Hi Stella! I have one request and one question for you, please: - My question is: there is a viewer that has contacted me because he wants to buy Chessnut Move but he lives en Mexico. Is there any possible way to help him get it? He says that he can't get it from the website. Can you advise, please? - My request: can you please put me in contact with someone from the technical team? My Move board is having problems. This weekend I tried to use it but many of the pieces weren't moving. I fully loaded their battery, and they appeared in the app with full battery (green circles) but when I placed them on the board, the board didn't detected them. I deleted the chess pieces from the app, and tried to pair them again (in all the channels, 0, 1, 2 and backup), but the board can't find the pieces at all. Now even after loading them, they just don't show up in the app, like they don't exist. And the pairing process fails, not detecting the pieces. Please help me ?? Thank you! -- [image: Logo] <https://techandising.com/> Joaquín Alviz Founder Móvil: (+34) 605 468 470 Mail: joaquin@techandising.com | www.techandising.com <https://www.facebook.com/techandising> <https://twitter.com/techandising> <https://www.instagram.com/techandising/> <https://www.youtube.com/c/techandising> <https://www.twitch.tv/techandising>

toAnalyze.subject: An update on your PayPal Case PP-R-DOY-611960277
toAnalyze.body: An update on your PayPal Case PP-R-DOY-611960277 Zhou Pinzhi, here are the details. Hello, Zhou Pinzhi Case status update We're happy to let you know that the credit card issuer has decided the chargeback in your favor. We've reimbursed your PayPal account for the $144.00 USD. Though this dispute has been adjudicated in your favor, we have charged you a Dispute Fee of $8.00 USD since your account was categorized into High Volume Dispute Fee tier when this dispute was filed. For more details about the Dispute Fee, please see our User Agreement. Case details Case ID: PP-R-DOY-611960277 Buyer's name: Danny Pham Buyer's email: dannydannypham@gmail.com Buyer's transaction ID: 4KL596945M467643A Your transaction ID: 0FS115289M194363J Invoice ID: rQb4h40Xvkkah724CeBSPmwj5 Transaction amount: $144.00 USD Transaction date: 1 January 2026 Disputed amount: $144.00 USD This case is now closed and there is no further action required. Thanks for your patience during this process. For more information on selling safely, please click Security near the bottom of any PayPal page. toAnalyze.subject: Order
toAnalyze.body: Request for chess order. Model: Chessnut Move Quantity: 500 Countries for delivery: Russia. If not possible - Kazakhstan. The buyer is a company, a legal entity. How much would such an order cost? What is the estimated time for delivery of goods and what is the delivery method? I wrote to you before, received not quite clear answer. Hope for specifics from your side. Thank you in advance, very much waiting for you.

toAnalyze.subject: Technical issue with Chessnut Evo - Unresponsive Touchscreen (Order #41217)
toAnalyze.body: Hello, I received my Chessnut Evo three days ago. Initially, everything worked perfectly, but when I turned it on today, the screen lit up but stopped responding to any touch input. I have already tried the following steps to resolve the issue: Restarted the device several times. Pressed the reset button. Unfortunately, nothing has helped so far. At one point, the screen worked again for about 5 seconds, but then it immediately became unresponsive again. What should I do to fix this? Order Number: #41217 Serial Number: CE16100247 Kind regards, Thomas Lässig

toAnalyze.subject: Re: Order #41321 confirmed
toAnalyze.body: Hi, Order #41321 I ordered these products on 1st April and have only got a confirmation of the order. On the website it did state that it should arrive around the 11th or 12th of April. So far I've not seen any dispatch notifications or any detail that the order is even being processed. Can you please advise when I can expect something to happen? Kind Regard Jason Burdett ________________________________ From: Chessnut <store+63095439612@t.shopifyemail.com> Sent: Wednesday, April 1, 2026 1:00 PM To: jasonburdett@gmail.com <jasonburdett@gmail.com> Subject: Order #41321 confirmed [Chessnut] Order #41321 Thank you for your purchase! Hi Jason, we're getting your order ready to be shipped. We will notify you when it has been sent.
